underlying_goal: Modernize legacy CSS by standardizing design tokens and replacing outdated layout patterns with modern CSS Grid/Flexbox
friction_detail: Aggressive cleanup removed functional classes (per-sponsor overrides, embed-responsive, social colors, btn-circle) causing multiple regressions that required rollback; wrong hover color applied (Bootstrap blue instead of teal).
brief_summary: User wanted full CSS modernization with design tokens and Flexbox/Grid layouts, achieved 16% CSS reduction and 103 passing tests after iterative fixes for regressions caused by over-aggressive cleanup.
